creator: erazorbg@gmail.com
text:
The WWW link in pkg-descr file points to 
http://packages.debian.org/testing/mail/ssmtp.html
which does not longer exists.

Fix: 

change line: 
from 
WWW: http://packages.debian.org/testing/mail/ssmtp.html
to
WWW: http://packages.debian.org/stable/mail/ssmtp
How-To-Repeat: %cd /usr/ports/mail/ssmtp/
%cat pkg-descr
